//: Ventoy control file. Copy to the ROOT of the Ventoy partition as /ventoy/ventoy.json.
//_paths: All paths are relative to the Ventoy partition root. Edit the ISO filenames to match exactly what you copied onto the stick (image supports fuzzy matching).

auto_install.//: WINDOWS - the golden ISO. Its template is the autounattend answer file (the one that WIPES disk 0 and reserves 128 GB). Keep it OFF the stick root if you prefer; here it lives under /ventoy/.
UBUNTU 26.04 - desktop ISO. Template is the cloud-init user-data (meta-data must sit in the same folder). Storage is interactive, so this pauses ONLY on the partition screen.
